What We Build

FENCE TYPES

01
Wood & Cedar Fences
Classic wood fencing built to last. Cedar is naturally rot-resistant and looks incredible — especially after a fresh stain. We do dog-ear, flat-top, picket, and custom board styles.
Cedar Dog-Ear Picket Flat Top Custom Boards
02
Privacy Fences
Full 6-8ft privacy panels for backyards, side yards, and property lines. Tight boards, no gaps. We get the posts set right so it stays solid for years.
6ft 8ft No Gaps Backyard Side Yard
03
Vinyl Fences
Low maintenance, clean look, holds up in all weather. Vinyl doesn't rot, warp, or need staining. Great option for front yards and pool areas where you want it to stay looking new.
White Vinyl Low Maintenance Pool Safe Front Yard
04
Chain Link Fences
Durable, cost-effective, and fast to install. Galvanized or vinyl-coated — good for large properties, yards with dogs, or anywhere you need a solid barrier without the price tag of wood.
Galvanized Vinyl Coated Large Properties Dog Yards
05
Gates & Entries
Single and double drive gates, walk gates, and custom entries built to match your fence or stand on their own. We get the hardware right so they swing smooth and latch clean.
Drive Gates Walk Gates Custom Hardware Double Gates
06
Repairs & Replacements
Leaning posts, rotted boards, broken gates, storm damage — we fix what's there or pull it and start fresh. Sometimes a repair is all it needs. We'll tell you straight.
Post Reset Board Replace Storm Damage Full Tear-Out

How We Work

BUILT TO LAST.

We don't cut corners on post depth, hardware, or material quality. A fence that leans or rots in two years isn't a fence — it's a problem you paid for.

Every job starts with a site look. We check the terrain, soil, and what your property needs before we touch anything. Then we build it right the first time.

✦ Posts set deep with proper concrete footings — no wobble
✦ Quality lumber and hardware — no bargain-bin materials
✦ Clean finish — tight boards, level lines, no sloppy cuts
✦ We haul all debris and leave the site clean when we're done
